documents.name: fnol.txt
documents.text: Policyholder Alex Rivera reports a collision on 2026-04-27 at the intersection of 5th Ave & Main St, San Jose, CA. Insured states the other driver 'ran the red light and hit my driver side'. Insured vehicle towed; insured reported neck pain. Other driver identified as Jordan Blake.

documents.name: police_report.pdf
documents.text: Officer narrative: Vehicle 2 (Blake) entered the intersection against a steady red signal and struck Vehicle 1 (Rivera), which had entered on a green signal. Signal timing log reviewed on scene. Vehicle 2 driver cited under CVC 21453 for failing to stop at a red signal. No citation issued to Vehicle 1.

documents.name: witness_statements.pdf
documents.text: Witness 1 (pedestrian): 'The silver car blew through the red, going maybe 50.' Witness 2 (driver behind Rivera): 'Light was green for us. The other car was speeding, well over the limit.' Posted limit on Main St is 35 mph.

documents.name: edr_readout.pdf
documents.text: Rivera vehicle EDR, 5 seconds pre-impact: speed 40 mph in a posted 35 mph zone; throttle steady; brake applied 0.6s before impact. Blake vehicle EDR not recovered.

documents.name: repair_invoice.pdf
documents.text: Certified body shop estimate: $31,200 (vehicle declared total loss, ACV basis). Medical: ER visit and follow-up for cervical strain, $10,800. Total documented damages: $42,000.
